description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular structure with a flat, dark-colored roof and large, grid-like windows along the front facade, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and open views. The building is accompanied by a smaller, attached structure, possibly a garage or utility room, both rendered in a light gray exterior. Behind the bungalow, there is a landscaped area with large, irregularly shaped boulders interspersed with lush tropical plants and several palm trees, creating a striking contrast between the built environment and natural elements. The windows are arranged in a linear, symmetrical fashion, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall setting suggests a harmonious blend of residential comfort and landscaped outdoor space. The clean lines and minimal ornamentation reinforce the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows and an attached utility structure, set against a backdrop of boulders and tropical landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow with large windows, flat roof, and the landscaped boulder and palm tree area behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the attached utility structure, and the depth of the landscaped area.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the boulders and tropical plants, with the bungalow's roof and back wall partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bungalow's side elevation, the attached structure, and the vertical arrangement of the landscaping.
